executives.name: Ron Hochstein
executives.background: Mr. Hochstein has been the President and Chief Executive Officer of the Company since 2014. He was previously the President and CEO of Denison Mines Corp. from 2009 to 2015 and served as President and COO from 2006 to 2009. He is a Professional Engineer and holds an MBA from the University of British Columbia.

executives.name: Christopher Wood
executives.background: Mr. Wood was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2023. He previously served as Vice President, Finance of the Company since 2018. Prior to joining Lundin Gold, he held senior financial roles at various mining companies including Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Nathan Monash
executives.background: Mr. Monash is the Vice President, Business Sustainability. He has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector, focusing on sustainability and corporate affairs. He previously held roles at AngloGold Ashanti and the World Economic Forum.

executives.name: Sheila Colman
executives.background: Ms. Colman is the Vice President, Legal and Corporate Secretary. She has been with the Company since 2015. Previously, she was General Counsel and Corporate Secretary at Denison Mines Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Legal and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Andre Oliveira
executives.background: Mr. Oliveira is the Vice President, Exploration. He joined Lundin Gold in 2023. He has extensive experience in mineral exploration across South America, previously working with Yamana Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Lundin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lundin is the Chair of the Board. He is currently the President and CEO of Lundin Mining Corporation. He has extensive experience in the resource industry and holds a Master of Engineering degree.

board_of_directors.name: Ron Hochstein
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Carmel Daniele
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Daniele is the founder and CIO of CD Capital. She has over 25 years of experience in natural resources investment and investment banking.

board_of_directors.name: Gillian Davidson
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Davidson is a sustainability advisor with over 20 years of experience in the extractives sector. She was previously Head of Mining & Metals at the World Economic Forum.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Ian Gibbs
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gibbs is a Canadian Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the resource sector. He has served as CFO for several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Ashley Heppenstall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Heppenstall has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas and resource sectors. He was the President and CEO of Lundin Petroleum AB from 2002 to 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Angelina Mehta
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Mehta is an engineer with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles in operations, investment banking, and private equity.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Scott McDonald
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McDonald is a senior executive with experience in corporate development and finance within the mining sector.

sources.source_description: Corporate Website - Management and Directors Profiles
